summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The VictoryShares Pioneer Asset-Based Income ETF (ABI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF the focuses on high-yield securities backed by assets tied to specialized lending and private credit. The funds objective is to pursue high current income from such securities from US and non-US entities. ABI was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by VictoryShares.

data.title: Victory Capital Expands VictoryShares® Offerings with Three New ETFs
data.text: SAN ANTONIO--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $VCTR--Victory Capital launches 3 ETFs: Pioneer Asset-Based Income (ABI), International Free Cash Flow (IFLO), International Free Cash Flow Growth (GRIN).
